title: Tirico tells students to keep ‘childlike wonder’ as thousands graduate Syracuse University (photos)
summary: Mike Tirico, a Syracuse University Newhouse School of Communications alumnus and prominent media personality, delivered the commencement address to thousands of graduating students, encouraging them to maintain 'childlike wonder.' This is a ceremonial university event with limited direct relevance to municipal innovation or city operations.
